channel.title: Beginners on Nilam's Page
channel.description: Recent content in Beginners on Nilam's Page

item.title: Getting Started with MIT Scratch: A Parent's Guide
item.description: Getting Started with MIT Scratch: A Parent’s Guide MIT Scratch is one of the best tools to introduce children to the world of coding. It’s visual, intuitive, and most importantly - fun! What is Scratch? Scratch is a block-based visual programming language developed by MIT Media Lab. Instead of typing complex code, kids drag and drop colorful blocks to create: 🎮 Interactive games 🎬 Animated stories 🎵 Music and sound projects 🤖 Simple simulations Why Scratch is Perfect for Kids 1.
